assertionResults.title: connects using the webSocketDebuggerUrl of the page target

assertionResults.title: enables Page, Runtime, and CSS domains

assertionResults.title: logs the Neural Uplink activation message

assertionResults.title: marks isConnected() true after successful connect

assertionResults.title: throws when no page target is found

assertionResults.title: uses custom debugPort from config

assertionResults.title: calls client.close() and marks isConnected() false

assertionResults.title: is a no-op if already disconnected

assertionResults.title: persists metadata to Akashik.db via oracle.execute when oracle is connected
